title: Qatar orders employees back to offices as remote work rule ends
summary_full: Qatar has officially ended its temporary remote work arrangement, directing employees back to offices after weeks of flexible working. Introduced in early March 2026 due to regional tensions, the policy's withdrawal signals a return to normal operations as conditions stabilize. Exemptions for essential workers and customer-facing roles remained throughout the period.
